compiled_state.title: [claude-safe worktree cleanup]: session ends after auto-compact event -> agent worktrees persist locked in .claude/worktrees/
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
### 2. Incident Overview

* **Scenario Type:** User-Flagged Behavior

#### Expected Behavior

Per CLAUDE.md "Worktree lifecycle (claude-safe)": after Claude exits, `_offer_worktree_cleanup` should auto-remove each agent worktree when it is an ancestor of main (`is_merged`) and has a clean working tree (`is_clean`). Non-clean / unmerged worktrees should either prompt the user or be surfaced during `/dso:end`.

Net effect: `.claude/worktrees/agent-*` should be empty (or near-empty) between sessions.

#### Actual Behavior

21 agent worktrees persist under `/Users/joeoakhart/digital-service-orchestra/.claude/worktrees/agent-*`, all carrying the `locked` flag in `git worktree list`. The user reports the originating sessions underwent auto-compact events before ending.

Status breakdown at time of observation (2026-04-16):

- 15 clean worktrees (dirty=0, unmerged=0) — should have been auto-removed
- 5 worktrees with untracked scratch files only (dirty=1, unmerged=0): `agent-a185b801`, `agent-a586392c`, `agent-a9725439`, `agent-afc1d037`, `agent-afe5cf05`
- 1 worktree with staged+untracked files AND 1 unmerged commit: `agent-af5f4a5b` (commit `9d684259` — RED test for ticket 639d-fe1b)

All 21 remain `locked`, blocking `git worktree remove` without `--force` or an explicit unlock.

#### Action History

- `git worktree list` — confirmed 21 `agent-*` entries marked `locked`
- `git -C <wt> status --porcelain` per worktree — classified clean vs. dirty
- `git -C <wt> log main..HEAD --oneline` per worktree — identified unmerged commit in `agent-af5f4a5b`

#### Technical Environment

- Worktree root: `/Users/joeoakhart/digital-service-orchestra/.claude/worktrees/`
- Main repo: `/Users/joeoakhart/digital-service-orchestra`
- Current session worktree: `/Users/joeoakhart/digital-service-orchestra-worktrees/worktree-20260416-180054`
- CLAUDE.md rule reference: "Worktree lifecycle (`claude-safe`)" section

#### Notes

User-supplied signal: the sessions that produced these worktrees had auto-compact events. Recorded as evidence, not cause.
